name: Dispel Magic
description: Choose a creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of level 3 or lower on the target ends; for a higher-level spell, make an ability check with your spellcasting ability (DC 10 + that spell's level) to end it. Engine: click a creature to strip the spell-layer magic it carries — active buffs (Bless, Haste, …) and the duration-bound conditions tracked as spell-condition effects (Color Spray's Blinded, …). The DC-10+level check for higher-level spells is descriptive.
